CONFIDENTIAL

To: Capital Markets Desk
From: Compliance
Date: 24 May 2026

Subject: Chinese wall procedure for Project Polaris

The Chinese wall between the equity research team and the M&A advisory team must be respected throughout this engagement. Signing Date is currently scheduled for 30 June 2026; until then the deal remains under embargo.

An ethical wall has been raised around the working group; do not discuss Project Polaris outside that group.
